executives.name: Jeffrey Bezos
executives.background: Jeffrey P. Bezos is the founder of Amazon and has served as Executive Chair since July 2021. He founded the company in 1994 and served as CEO from then until July 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, Executive Chairman (formerly President, CEO, and Chairman)

executives.name: Andrew Jassy
executives.background: Andrew R. Jassy has been President and CEO of Amazon since July 2021. He previously served as CEO of Amazon Web Services (AWS) from April 2016 to July 2021 and joined the company in 1997.

executives.name: Douglas Herrington
executives.background: Douglas J. Herrington has been CEO of Worldwide Amazon Stores since July 2022. He joined Amazon in 2005 and previously served as Senior Vice President, North America Consumer.

executives.name: Adam Selipsky
executives.background: Adam N. Selipsky was CEO of Amazon Web Services from May 2021 to June 2024. He previously served as President and CEO of Tableau Software.

tenure_dates.title: CEO, Amazon Web Services (Senior Executive / Officer)

executives.name: Brian Olsavsky
executives.background: Brian T. Olsavsky has been Senior Vice President and CFO since June 2015. He joined Amazon in 2002 and has held various financial leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: David Zapolsky
executives.background: David A. Zapolsky has been Senior Vice President, Global Public Policy and General Counsel since 2023. He joined Amazon in 1999.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Global Public Policy and General Counsel
Senior Vice President, Chief Global Affairs & Legal Officer (formerly Associate General Counsel, Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary)

executives.name: Alicia Boler Davis
executives.background: CEO of Alto Pharmacy. Former Senior Vice President of Global Customer Fulfillment at Amazon.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Global Customer Fulfillment

executives.name: Ariel Kelman
executives.background: Ariel Kelman is President and Chief Marketing Officer of Salesforce. He joined Salesforce in 2023 from Oracle, where he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer.

executives.name: Brad Smith
executives.background: President of Marshall University and former Chairman and CEO of Intuit Inc.

executives.name: Daniel Huttenlocher
executives.background: Dean of the MIT Schwarzman College of Computing.

executives.name: Edith Cooper
executives.background: Co-founder of Medley and former Global Head of Human Capital Management at Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Indra Nooyi
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of PepsiCo, Inc.

executives.name: Jamie Gorelick
executives.background: Partner at Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr LLP and former Deputy Attorney General of the United States.

executives.name: Jason Child
executives.background: Jason Child has served as our Chief Financial Officer since November 2022. Prior to joining Arm, Mr. Child served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Splunk Inc. from 2019 to 2022. He has also held CFO roles at Opendoor, Jawbone, and Groupon, and spent over 11 years at Amazon in various financial leadership roles.

executives.name: John Doerr
executives.background: L. John Doerr has been a director since 1999. He is the Chairman of Kleiner Perkins, a venture capital firm.

executives.name: Jonathan Rubinstein
executives.background: Former co-CEO of Bridgewater Associates and former Senior Vice President at Apple Inc.

executives.name: Judith McGrath
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of MTV Networks.

executives.name: Keith Alexander
executives.background: Former Director of the National Security Agency and former Commander of U.S. Cyber Command.

executives.name: Kirk Koenigsbauer
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer and Corporate Vice President of Microsoft's Experiences and Devices Group.

tenure_dates.title: General Manager, Software & Video Games Stores

executives.name: Patricia Stonesifer
executives.background: Former CEO of Martha's Table and former CEO of the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation.

executives.name: Wendell Weeks
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Corning Incorporated.
